response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in hardware/SoC modeling, AI accelerator optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis, which are core requirements for this role. While the resume demonstrates strong software engineering skills across various domains, it does not align with the technical depth or specialization needed for hardware-software co-design or performance optimization at the system level.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with experience in performance optimization and system architecture
Proven ability to work in diverse environments (embedded systems, micro-services, real-time systems)
Extensive experience with multiple programming languages and technologies (TypeScript, D, C++, etc.)
concerns: No demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization
Education and professional experience do not meet the required technical depth for the principal-level role
Lacks evidence of deep neural network training/inference optimization or GPU architecture expertise

key_factors.factor: System architecture design for AI accelerators
